item.title: CEO Video Series: Hydrogen leaders on building at scale
item.dc:creator: Vanina Morrison
item.description: In our latest video, industry leaders give us real-world insights into what that looks like in practice: a $2 billion clean hydrogen complex in Alberta, Canada; large-scale electrolysers in France and the Netherlands, powering heavy industry and mobility; and a new high-pressure filling centre in Korea securing hydrogen supply for the Seoul metropolitan area. What needs to happen next? The message in the video is clear: synchronization between supply, demand, infrastructure and policy is essential to scale. And scale requires collaboration – across companies, borders, and sectors. It’s time to lead, build and deliver. Watch the video below. With thanks to Sanjiv Lamba, Chairman and CEO, Linde; Werner Ponikwar, CEO, thyssenkrupp nucera; and Armelle Levieux, Group VP, Innovation & Technology, Air Liquide. The post CEO Video Series: Hydrogen leaders on building at scale appeared first on Hydrogen Council .
